name: Five Spice Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp five spice powder blend (1 t)
1 egg beaters® 99% egg substitute, or equivalent to 1 (1)
1 tbsp water, up to 2 Tbsp (1 - 2 T)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the semolina flour and five spice powder blend in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg substitute or equivalent.
3. Add the beaten eggs, vegetable oil (if using), and water to the dry ingredients.
4. Knead the dough until it forms a smooth ball.
5. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
6. Roll out the dough thinly on a floured surface.
7. Cut into desired pasta shapes using a pasta cutter or knife.
8. Cook the pasta in boiling water until al dente, then drain and serve with your favorite sauce.
